title: Fergania polyantha

It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which can aid in the treatment of various conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The bioactive constituents of Fergania polyantha include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Fergania polyantha is commonly used in traditional medicine to prepare teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
